---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the AI GRC Platform
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem This Solves

What problem or pain point does this feature address?

Example: "As a compliance officer, I need to export controls to Excel so that I can share them with external auditors who don't have platform access."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. Include any mockups, diagrams, or API design ideas if you have them.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Framework / Compliance Context

If this request is related to a specific compliance framework or regulation, please provide context:
- Framework: e.g. GDPR, PCI DSS 4.0, CMMC 2.0
- Relevant controls or articles: e.g. GDPR Article 30, PCI DSS Req 12.3
- Reference: (link to spec or standard if publicly available)

## Impact

Who would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Compliance Officers
- [ ] Risk Managers
- [ ] Auditors
- [ ] Developers / Integrators
- [ ] IT Administrators
- [ ] Other (specify):

## Priority

How important is this to you?
- [ ] Critical — blocking my use of the platform
- [ ] High — significantly improves my workflow
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — minor improvement

## Are you willing to contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this myself and open a PR
- [ ] Yes, I can help test it
- [ ] No, but I'd love someone else to pick this up

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references here.
